name: Contractor payment flow
description: Onboarded company for non-canary contractor payment specs (contractor-payment, contractor-payment-create-full-lifecycle, contractor-payment-submit-lifecycle). The base demo react_sdk_demo_company_onboarded already ships with payment-ready contractors (Ella Fitzgerald, Louis Armstrong) — the scenario runner's contractor decoration only sets profile fields (no address, no payment method, no onboarding completion), so a decorated contractor never appears in the 'Pay contractors' list anyway. No decorations are needed; this scenario exists as a distinct id from contractor/full-flow-canary so the canary suite's mutating tests stay cache-isolated from these read-only payment lifecycle specs.
